contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: ERA Butterfly Effect cohort onboarding — plan of record + WhatsApp PDF
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/154
  
  Details:
  Bilal introduced the rest of his ERA team this afternoon; scope expanded from a single demo participant to onboarding all of ERA's existing students (current cohort + historical alumni). Captured the next-week plan in agentic_ai_context as the canonical reference, with a 4-page PDF companion for sharing on the DAO WhatsApp channel.
  
  PR: TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context#154 (squash-merged 4cfcc6b).
  
  Files added:
    - BUTTERFLY_EFFECT_COHORT_ONBOARDING_PLAN.md  (canonical source, 111 lines)
    - BUTTERFLY_EFFECT_COHORT_ONBOARDING_PLAN.pdf (4 pages, ~140KB; rendered via WeasyPrint with TrueSight navy + Butterfly Effect warm-amber accent palette)
    - CONTEXT_UPDATES.md entry pointing future agents at the doc
  
  Plan structure (build / write / defer / decide / sequencing) becomes the canonical shape for future partner onboardings — when the third partner shows up after Tribo Mirim + Butterfly Effect, copy this doc structure rather than re-deriving the framework.
  
  Three things to build this week:
    - Cohort batch-import CLI (dao_client/modules/onboard_program_cohort.py — mirrors onboard_retail_partner.py)
    - public_listable consent flag (lineage-credentials identity schema + index builder + members.html filter)
    - Cert template year-as-variable (lineage-engine/scripts/program_assets/butterfly-effect/cert_config.json + cert_overlay.py)
  
  One doc to write: PROGRAM_OPERATOR_HANDOFF.md (generalized beyond Butterfly Effect so the next partner inherits it).
  
  Two things deferred with reason:
    - Autopilot ↔ credentialing read-access — yes in principle, but waits until 10-20 real students are live so governor-chat queries can answer real questions instead of demo-data questions
    - Phase 4.2/4.3 of the credential freshness work — waits for real cohort use to surface actual friction
  
  Five questions ERA's team needs to answer (consent model, scope of past cohorts, first batch size, photo consent, certificate review/sign-off) — listed in §5 of the plan.
  
  Sequencing principle: each step generates the data the next step needs. Don't build N+1 before step N has produced real evidence of what's needed. Specifically: cohort import CLI ships first → ERA imports 5-10 students → we observe friction → patch → expand → autopilot read-access → decide on event-subscription based on real signal patterns.
  
  Stable URL for the PDF (so the WhatsApp message recipients can re-pull a fresh copy later): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/main/BUTTERFLY_EFFECT_COHORT_ONBOARDING_PLAN.pdf
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
